questions.question:
A metadata diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `meta-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `downwardapi-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `meta-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment meta-api -n downwardapi-lab -o wide`
- `envNameCheck` is `kubectl get deployment meta-api -n downwardapi-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].env[0].name}'`
- `fieldPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment meta-api -n downwardapi-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].env[0].valueFrom.fieldRef.fieldPath}'`
- `namespaceFieldCheck` is `kubectl get deployment meta-api -n downwardapi-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].env[1].valueFrom.fieldRef.fieldPath}'`
- `containerNameCheck` is `kubectl get deployment meta-api -n downwardapi-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].name}'`
- `imageCheck` is `kubectl get deployment meta-api -n downwardapi-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n downwardapi-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm downward API fieldRef paths and target env names before changing workload manifests or forcing pod recreation`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/meta-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/meta-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Downward API Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete pods, do not restart the Deployment, and do not patch the live Deployment during this drill.

verification.description: The metadata diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended deployment target, exact Downward API inspection commands, event evidence, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact Downward API env and metadata inspection commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe Downward API remediation guidance is removed
